rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Deft'S Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 583.410 And 583.420
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 08, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Red-White Valve Corp.'s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution pursuant to C.C.P. 583.410 and 583.420 is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed April 28, 2014. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JACK SOWERS et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 08, 2014 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Dillingham Construction N.A., Inc.'s demurrer to third amended complaint is continued on the court's own motion to May 20, 2014. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: CAROL HAYNES et al VS. BASF CORPORATION INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs' Motion And Application For Leave To Amend The Second Amended Complaint To Reflect Plaintiff'S Death In The Alternative An Order Shortening Time To Hear Plaintiffs' Motion For Leave To Amend
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 08, 2014 in Department 503, Line 3. Plaintiffs' motion for leave to amend the first amended complaint to reflect plaintiff's death is off calendar pursuant to the order advancing the hearing to May 7, 2014. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN CHOW et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 08, 2014 in Department 503, Line 4. Defendant 3M Company's motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)
